coupon.source_phrase_block: This is an e-voucher . Coupon is emailed to the patron. Only Valid for the Reserved Date of Visit. This coupon is good for: - Daytime Mansion Tour admission for two adults at $5 per person, and two children free (regularly $16 per adult and $11 for children ages 6-16). Mansion tours are offered Monday, Wednesday, Friday, and Saturdays. -One Take-a-Walk bag rental at $2/hr (regularly $5). Take-a-Walk bags for youth ages 4 and up contain outdoor seasonal activities for up to two children and are available Monday-Saturday. -Story Time for two children at $5 per child, and an accompanying adult free. Please note:
